description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large, open living spaces with floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that provide direct access to a spacious outdoor patio and swimming pool area. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of natural wood and dark trim, complemented by landscaped greenery and several trees. The layout includes multiple bedrooms, a central living area, and an attached garage with space for two vehicles. Outdoor lounge furniture surrounds the pool, creating a luxurious and inviting atmosphere. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open sightlines, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive glass windows, a pool, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features clean lines, white facades, and integrated garage and patio spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, pool, patio, and outdoor lounge area with visible landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, stair access, and the arrangement of trees and patio furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, driveway, and the linear arrangement of rooms along the length of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the pool, patio, and the connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors
